title: Review Tote Task Details In the Tote Task Interface
summary: Use the Tote Task interface in the Aveva API page to inspect the current tote task and capture the tote, AGV, destination, station, task identifiers, task name, and any tote error shown for tote movement tracking.
when_to_use: Use when you need to view current tote task information in the Tote Task interface and identify the displayed tote movement and task-related fields.
not_for: Do not use to infer missing values or meanings that are not shown in the interface.
Do not use when required task fields are not visible or cannot be interpreted from the interface.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Tote Task interface and record the displayed tote and task values exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This is a screen-based review procedure supported as safe in the source packet.
Do not infer values or meanings that are not explicitly shown in the interface.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Tote Task interface
Visibility of the Aveva API Tote Task page

access_required: Access to the Tote Task interface
Visibility of the Aveva API Tote Task page
system_preconditions: The Tote Task interface is available for viewing.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Tote Tasks Aveva API page and listed tote task fields.

steps.title: Open or view the Tote Task interface
steps.purpose: Access the screen that displays current tote task details.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Tote Task interface in the Aveva API page.
steps.expected_result: The Tote Task interface is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tote Task interface is displayed and the task-related fields are visible for review.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote Task interface is not visible or the needed fields cannot be seen.

actions.label: View Tote Task interface
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Tote Task interface in the Aveva API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote Tasks Aveva API page and the listed task detail fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required task fields are not visible.
The interface cannot be interpreted from the available view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tote Task interface offers insight into tote movements within the warehouse.

steps.title: Identify the current task information
steps.purpose: Confirm that the screen is showing the current tote task details to be reviewed.
steps.instruction: Identify the current task information shown for the tote.
steps.expected_result: The current task information for the tote is identified on the interface.
steps.healthy_condition: Current task details are present and readable on the Tote Task interface.
steps.failure_condition: Current task details are missing, unclear, or cannot be interpreted.

actions.label: Inspect current task information
actions.exact_action: Identify the current task information shown for the tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Current task details area on the Tote Tasks Aveva API page.

stop_or_escalate_if: Current task information is not visible.
Current task information cannot be interpreted from the interface.

source_evidence.retrieval_text: The aligned transcript adds that users can view current task details, exchange type, whether the exchange is a priority, whether the tote is ready for exchange, whether an AGV is behind it ready to go, what station it is at, sorter task UID, pickup tote task name, and any error information.

steps.title: Read Tote ID and AGV ID
steps.purpose: Identify the tote and the associated AGV shown on the current task.
steps.instruction: Read the Tote ID and AGV ID fields to identify the tote and associated vehicle.
steps.expected_result: The displayed Tote ID and AGV ID are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Both Tote ID and AGV ID fields are visible and readable.
steps.failure_condition: One or both identifier fields are missing, blank, or unreadable.

actions.label: Inspect Tote ID and AGV ID
actions.exact_action: Read the Tote ID and AGV ID fields to identify the tote and associated vehicle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote ID and AGV ID fields on the Tote Task interface.

stop_or_escalate_if: The identifiers cannot be interpreted from the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Fields shown include Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error; transcript also mentions sorter task UID.

steps.title: Check Original Destination and Station
steps.purpose: Determine where the tote is assigned and what station it is at.
steps.instruction: Check the Original Destination and Station fields to see where the tote is assigned and what station it is at.
steps.expected_result: The displayed Original Destination and Station values are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Original Destination and Station fields are visible and readable.
steps.failure_condition: Original Destination or Station is missing, blank, or unreadable.

actions.label: Inspect destination and station
actions.exact_action: Check the Original Destination and Station fields to see where the tote is assigned and what station it is at.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Original Destination and Station fields on the Tote Task interface.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed values cannot be interpreted.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Fields shown include Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error; transcript also mentions sorter task UID.

steps.title: Review task identifiers and task name
steps.purpose: Identify the active task record shown for the tote.
steps.instruction: Review the Task ID, sorter task UID if shown, and Task Name fields to identify the active task record.
steps.expected_result: The displayed Task ID, sorter task UID if present, and Task Name are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Task ID and Task Name are visible, and sorter task UID is captured if shown.
steps.failure_condition: Task ID or Task Name is not visible, or the task record cannot be interpreted.

actions.label: Inspect task identifiers
actions.exact_action: Review the Task ID, sorter task UID if shown, and Task Name fields to identify the active task record.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Task ID, sorter task UID reference if shown, and Task Name fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: The task record cannot be interpreted from the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Fields shown include Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error; transcript also mentions sorter task UID.

source_evidence.retrieval_text: The aligned transcript adds that users can view current task details... sorter task UID, pickup tote task name, and any error information.

steps.title: Check the Tote Error field
steps.purpose: Determine whether the interface shows a tote-related error.
steps.instruction: Check the Tote Error field to see whether an error is shown for the tote.
steps.expected_result: Any displayed tote error information is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tote Error field is visible and can be read, including when no error is shown.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote Error field is not visible or cannot be interpreted.

actions.label: Inspect Tote Error
actions.exact_action: Check the Tote Error field to see whether an error is shown for the tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote Error field on the Tote Task interface.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Tote Error field is not visible.
The Tote Error field cannot be interpreted.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Fields shown include Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error; transcript also mentions sorter task UID.
The Tote Task interface includes a Tote Error field; the transcript also references checking if there is any error.

steps.title: Record displayed values exactly as shown
steps.purpose: Preserve the observed tote task details without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed values exactly as shown in the interface.
steps.expected_result: The displayed Tote ID, AGV ID, destination, station, task identifiers, task name, and any tote error are captured exactly as shown.
steps.healthy_condition: Values are recorded directly from the interface without inference.
steps.failure_condition: Values cannot be captured exactly, or interpretation would be required to complete the record.

actions.label: Record displayed values
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed values exactly as shown in the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: All displayed tote task fields to transcribe exactly as shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required task fields are not visible.
Displayed values cannot be interpreted confidently from the interface.
Recording the values would require inference.

success_criteria: The Tote Task interface is visible.
The current tote task information is identified.
Displayed values for Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error are captured exactly as shown.
Sorter task UID is captured if shown on the interface.
healthy_conditions: The Tote Task interface provides visible current task details.
Key tote and task fields are readable on the interface.
Any tote error information can be viewed in the Tote Error field.
failure_conditions: Required task fields are not visible.
Displayed values cannot be interpreted from the interface.
The user would need to infer missing values or meanings.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if required task fields are not visible or cannot be interpreted from the interface.
Do not infer missing values or meanings that are not shown in the source-backed interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote Tasks Aveva API page showing tote task detail fields.
